# Antek Automation — Full Context
> UK AI automation agency building AI voice agents, chatbots and workflow automation for service businesses. Based in Hampshire, serving UK-wide.

## About
Antek Automation is a UK-based AI automation company founded by Andy Norman. With 30+ years in technology, Andy set up Antek Automation after seeing local tradespeople and service businesses losing work to missed calls, slow follow-ups, and admin overload.

The company is based at Chantry House, 38 Chantry Way, Andover, Hampshire SP10 1LZ. Antek Automation is a Certified Retell AI Partner and FSB (Federation of Small Businesses) member. The company serves UK businesses nationwide, with a particular focus on service businesses, tradespeople, and SMEs.

Phone: 0333 038 9960
Email: hello@antekautomation.com

## Core Services

### AI Receptionist (Productised)
Page: https://www.antekautomation.com/ai-receptionist

Productised AI phone answering service for UK SMBs and businesses. Screens every caller, captures the details you need, and books qualified enquiries straight into your calendar.

Pricing tiers:
- Starter: £97/month + £249 one-off setup. Includes 120 call minutes. Call answering, screening, summaries.
- Standard: £198/month + £249 setup. Includes 240 call minutes. Adds CRM and API integrations.
- Pro: Contact sales. Custom minutes. Adds workflow automations for complex voice agent workflows.
- Overage: £0.18/min over included minutes.

Live in 24–48 hours. No contracts — rolling monthly.

Industry-specific pages with tailored screening flows:
- [Electricians](https://www.antekautomation.com/ai-receptionist/electricians) — Emergency vs routine triage, EICR/Part P capture
- [Plumbers](https://www.antekautomation.com/ai-receptionist/plumbers) — Leak triage, stopcock guidance, boiler make/model
- [HVAC Engineers](https://www.antekautomation.com/ai-receptionist/hvac) — Heating/cooling triage, fault codes, maintenance contracts
- [Accountants](https://www.antekautomation.com/ai-receptionist/accountants) — New client screening, business type/turnover
- [Lawyers & Solicitors](https://www.antekautomation.com/ai-receptionist/lawyers) — Matter type routing, conflict check capture
- [Veterinary Practices](https://www.antekautomation.com/ai-receptionist/veterinary-practices) — Emergency triage, species/symptoms, OOH routing
- [Dentists](https://www.antekautomation.com/ai-receptionist/dentists) — NHS vs private, emergency dental triage
- [Therapists](https://www.antekautomation.com/ai-receptionist/therapists) — Warm intake, presenting concern capture, crisis protocol

Live demo numbers (UK, 24/7, powered by Retell AI):
- Bolt Electrical AI Reception: 07782 214455 (try asking about a fuse board replacement)
- Antek Plumbing & Heating AI Receptionist: 0333 051 0944 (try booking a boiler service)
- Ember & Oak Restaurant AI Host: 07426 476540 (try booking a table for four)

### AI Voice Agents
Page: https://www.antekautomation.com/services/ai-voice-assistants

24/7 AI-powered phone agents built on Retell AI (Certified Partner). Picks up on the first ring, answers questions, books appointments, captures caller details, and transfers calls when needed.

Same pricing tiers as AI Receptionist (Starter £97, Standard £198, Pro contact sales). 120 minutes included on Starter, 240 on Standard. £0.18/min overage. Pro tier includes workflow automations for complex voice agent workflows.

### AI Chatbots
Page: https://www.antekautomation.com/services/ai-chatbots

Custom-trained website chatbots. Trained on your specific business, services, pricing, and FAQs. Answers questions, qualifies leads, captures contact details, books appointments. Unlimited conversations — no per-message limits.

Pricing: £57/month + £149 one-off setup. No contracts.

Typically handles around 80% of standard conversations autonomously (rate depends on training quality and question complexity). Complex or unusual queries escalated to your team.

### Workflow Automation
Page: https://www.antekautomation.com/services/workflow-automation

Business process automation built on n8n (open-source, self-hosted). Connects 400+ tools including Google Workspace, Xero, Stripe, HubSpot, Slack, WhatsApp, Shopify, Tradify, Jobber, ServiceM8. You own the workflows — no vendor lock-in.

Pricing: From £250 one-off for a starter workflow. Complex builds scoped per project. Ongoing retainer available.
Timeline: Simple workflows 1–2 days. Complex multi-system builds 1–2 weeks.
Clients typically save 10–20 hours/week on admin (depends on volume of manual work replaced).

### GEO Audits (Generative Engine Optimisation)
Page: https://www.antekautomation.com/services/geo-audit

GEO — Generative Engine Optimisation — gets your business cited in AI-generated answers from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, and Gemini.

Pricing:
- Quick Check: £247 — AI visibility across 4 platforms, 10 prompts tested, citation readiness score, top 5 priorities, Loom walkthrough + 1-page PDF
- Full Audit: £497 — everything in Quick Check plus full technical review, schema audit, content analysis, 3 competitor benchmarks, 30+ test prompts
- Audit + Fix: from £997 — Full Audit plus we implement the priority fixes. Final price scoped to site size and complexity, since larger or messier sites need more work.
- Monthly Retainer: £497/month (min 3 months) — ongoing citation monitoring, content updates, schema maintenance, monthly report, quarterly strategy call

All audits delivered within 24 hours. Ongoing fixes handled via the monthly retainer.

### Generative Engine Optimisation Agency
Page: https://www.antekautomation.com/services/geo

Full GEO service for UK businesses: citability optimisation, schema and structured data, llms.txt and AI crawler access, entity and citation building, and monthly AI answer monitoring across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini and Google AI Overviews. Starts with a free AI Visibility Check (48-hour turnaround). GEO Audit £247 one-off; GEO Retainer from £497/month, projects from £997.

### AI SEO Agency
Page: https://www.antekautomation.com/services/ai-seo

AI SEO for UK businesses — Google rankings and AI answer visibility handled together under one strategy: AI-assisted keyword and content strategy, content optimised for AI Overviews, technical SEO, generative engine optimisation and plain-English reporting. Free AI Visibility Check; AI SEO Retainer from £497/month.

### Pricing Page
Page: https://www.antekautomation.com/pricing

Full transparent pricing for all five products with comparison table, per-product tier breakdowns, FAQ, and Resources & Compliance section.

## Support and Compliance
- Standard support response: within 24 hours
- Critical incident response (e.g. agent offline during business hours): within 4 hours
- Call recording retention: 90 days, then permanently deleted
- Chat transcript retention: 12 months
- Data residency: UK/EU
- GDPR compliant. DPA available on request.
- No long-term contracts on any monthly plan.

## Service Areas
Headquartered in Andover, Hampshire. UK-wide remote delivery.

## Industries Served
Hospitality, dental practices, legal firms, accounting practices, trades (plumbers, electricians, HVAC, builders, roofers), cleaning companies, estate agents, salons, fitness and wellness, property management, veterinary practices, professional services, IT and MSPs.

## Key Differentiators
- Certified Retell AI Partner (voice AI)
- Hampshire-based, London-quality delivery at non-London prices
- 30+ years in service business technology
- Builds AI systems daily using the same technology stack as GEO auditing
- FSB Member
- Face-to-face meetings available for Hampshire-based clients
